text: hey
Hello

I added a new Current Week insights endpoint to the Mongo API. It returns message count and active users and top users for the week. And I added a Jest/Supertest unit test file to make sure the endpoint works. I pushed to GitHub on the branch sud-insights-week and I opened a PR to merge it into main.

text:
in the meantime, i'd say <@U0AE02BRXGC> keep us updated on what discoveries you have on possible models we can use for the data processing; at the same time <@U0ADWDS3CHY> and <@U0ADF0PSDLP> if you haven't already take a peek at our updated architecture that John made last week to get an idea of how we want to structure message summaries and put it in a visual dashboard (the diagram is at the bottom of this page on our doc: <https://capstone-projects-2026-spring.github.io/project-structuring-unstructured-data/docs/system-architecture/design>)

Let us know if you have any questions about it, but otherwise try to find/make tasks that'll either help us store the results from the LLM or how to format some kind of UI or visual for the user that actually displays the daily reports in a meaningful way. Remember our goal for the MVP is to actually have our app spit out a cohesive and meaningful representation of a day's worth of message in any way that is meaningful, so whatever data models or dashboards we design should reflect that basic idea :)

text: It is currently running locally on my machine, so my next step is to setup deployments for our app so that we can have it up and running. Once I review all my code I will make a PR with all of the changes and updates. I expect it will be a fairly large PR but it should allow for the whole start to finish data flow to work in it's current state. Next steps will be to create the processes that actually structure the data and send the data into the LLM to create the daily reports.

text: We can then just think about what specifically we would want to in each view

elements.text: We can then just think about what specifically we would want to in each view

text:
How does this seem for our application at least to start:

Dashboard for team admin

Current Week view
Takes all of the data from the current work week and attempts to make insights on what is being communicated during this week, to gain insights on team needs and overall progress

Past Weeks view
Complete datasets for the past weeks to review progress and see what was being discussed during those timeframes

Monthly Overview
High level breakdown of each month to give a general overview of what happened during the month.

*Demo Notes*
1. Incorporate serious examples to the presentation 
2. Direction of our project is unclear
3. Intro was good, consider scrolling through messages
4. Think about use cases: Users and projects
5. User may turn off the save feature
6. ?Batching could be an alternative ie bundling several messages that were sent in a certain amount of time
7. Possibly using a combination of extractive and abstractive
8. Think about friction
also 9. consider Trello or other external apps that users may want interactions w/
